evals.expected_output: An issues.md report with verdict, files reviewed table, and any issues found. Should load the automation checklist since changes are test files.
evals.context: Branch fe-2755 checked out (4 files, ~200 lines changed — test automation code)
expectations: Report includes verdict (Ready / Ready with Warnings / Not Ready)
All 4 changed files appear in Files Reviewed table
Chat summary shows file count, issue counts, and verdict
Completes in 4 or fewer tool-call rounds (the speed target)

evals.expected_output: A fast review of a tiny 1-line change. Should skip loading any reference checklist since diff is <100 lines.
evals.context: Branch fe-2792 checked out (1 file, 1 line changed)
expectations: Does NOT load any reference checklist file (diff is tiny)
Completes in 3 or fewer tool-call rounds
Report is proportionally brief for a 1-line change

evals.prompt: check my diff before I open a PR
evals.expected_output: A review of 7 files with ~90 lines changed, covering page objects and test specs.
evals.context: Branch fe-2750 checked out (7 files, 90 insertions, 10 deletions — page objects + test specs)
expectations: All 7 changed files appear in Files Reviewed table
Chat summary shows file count, issue counts, and verdict
Completes in 4 or fewer tool-call rounds
Risk categorization is reasonable (test files = low risk, page objects = medium/low risk)
